name: wwt-partner-pipeline-report
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the wwt-partner-pipeline-report plugin.

plugins.name: wwt-partner-pipeline-report
plugins.description: Build a Salesforce partner-pipeline report (partner status, named sponsors, open + lifetime pipeline, ZoomInfo/document/meeting/Slack signals, certifications/awards/labs/service capabilities, explicit ATC demo status, a fundraising/investor/relative-strength assessment for privately-held partners, and each partner's competitive landscape with competitors' own WWT standing) via parallel subagents + QA, published as a clean standalone report.
